content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Fox And Names". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/510/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The next n lines contain a string s.
content.outputFormat: Print the number of distinct names.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
general mixed case
hidden.input:
6
a
b
c
a
d
b

solution.approach: Use a set to store unique names

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
s = set()
for _ in range(n):
    str = input()
    s.add(str)
print(len(s))
